jsonLd.title: NABARD is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at NABARD are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NABARD:
NABARD is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NABARD!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
